title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For July 2022
text: NOBL gains 0.31% in May but is down 5.99% in 2022 after the first 5 months. Thus far, through June 28th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 6.22%, inclusive of its dividend payment this month.

title: Sherwin-Williams: Deserving Attention For The Long Term
text: Sherwin-Williams is a global leader in manufacturing, distributing, and selling paint, coatings, and other related products. Revenue has grown at 10 and 5-year CAGRs of 8.4% and 11.0%.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Inks Deal to Buy Gross & Perthun GmbH
text: Sherwin-Williams' (SHW) deal with Gross & Perthun GmbH provides multiple opportunities to boost profitable growth throughout Europe and beyond.

title: Credit Suisse Sees Winners Among Defensive Specialty Chemicals Stocks
text: Specialty chemicals is not an industry that jumps off the page to many investors, as it generally acts as an adjunct to other more dynamic industries.

title: There Are Cracks In The Paint At Sherwin-Williams
text: The analyst's sentiment for Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) has been slipping over the past few months and now the downtrend is gaining momentum. Analysts at Credit Suisse downgraded the stock to sell citing a number of factors that amount to one thing
